documentation: Attribute AclEntries: The IP entries that you want to remove from the network ACL.

documentation: Attribute AclId: The ID of the ACL.

documentation:
Attribute AddressIpVersion: The IP version.

Valid values: ipv4 and ipv6.

documentation: Attribute RelatedListeners: The listeners that are associated with the network ACL.

documentation: Attribute ResourceGroupId: The resource group ID.

documentation: Attribute Tags: The tags of the resource.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::SLB::AccessControl`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosAccessControl\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-slb-accesscontrol>

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.AccessControlProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `AccessControl`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-slb-accesscontrol>

```
param acl_id

Property aclId: The ID of the ACL.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.AccessControlProps.acl_id
documentation: Property aclId: The ID of the ACL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.AccessControlProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheck: Specifies whether to enable health checks.

documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckConnectPort: The port of the backend server that is used for health checks. Valid values: 1 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_health_check_domain
documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckDomain: The domain name that is used for health checks. Valid values:  $_ip: The private IP address of the backend server. If the $_ip parameter is set or the HealthCheckDomain parameter is not set, SLB uses the private IP addresses of backend servers as the domain names for health checks. domain: The domain name must be 1 to 80 characters in length. It can contain only letters, digits, periods (.),and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_health_check_http_code
documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckHttpCode: The HTTP status code that indicates a successful health check. Separate multiple HTTP status codes with commas (,). Default value: http_2xx.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_health_check_interval
documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckInterval: The time interval between two consecutive health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_health_check_timeout
documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckTimeout: The timeout period of a health check response. If a backend ECS instance does not send an expected response within the specified period of time, the ECS instance is considered unhealthy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_health_check_uri
documentation: :Attribute: HealthCheckUri: The URI that is used for health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_healthy_threshold
documentation: :Attribute: HealthyThreshold: The number of consecutive successful health checks that must occur before an unhealthy backend server is declared healthy. In this case, the health check state is changed from fail to success.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_listener_port
documentation: :Attribute: ListenerPort: The listener port that is used by the SLB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_listener_sync
documentation: :Attribute: ListenerSync: Indicates whether the forwarding rule uses the scheduling algorithm, session persistence, and health check configurations of the listener.

documentation: :Attribute: LoadBalancerId: The ID of the SLB instance.

documentation: :Attribute: RuleId: The ID of the forwarding rule.

documentation: :Attribute: RuleName: The name of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_scheduler
documentation: :Attribute: Scheduler: The scheduling algorithm.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_sticky_session
documentation: :Attribute: StickySession: Indicates whether session persistence is enabled.  Valid values: on and off.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_sticky_session_type
documentation: :Attribute: StickySessionType: The method that is used to handle a cookie.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_unhealthy_threshold
documentation: :Attribute: UnhealthyThreshold: The number of consecutive failed health checks that must occur before a healthy backend server is declared unhealthy. In this case, the health check state is changed from success to fail.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.RosRule.attr_url
documentation: :Attribute: Url: The URL that is configured in the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_cookie
documentation: Attribute Cookie: The cookie to be configured on the backend server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_cookie_timeout
documentation: Attribute CookieTimeout: The timeout period of a cookie.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_domain
documentation: Attribute Domain: The domain name that is configured in the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check
documentation: Attribute HealthCheck: Specifies whether to enable health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_connect_port
documentation:
Attribute HealthCheckConnectPort: The port of the backend server that is used for health checks.

Valid values: 1 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_domain
documentation:
Attribute HealthCheckDomain: The domain name that is used for health checks.

Valid values:  $_ip: The private IP address of the backend server. If the $_ip parameter is set or the HealthCheckDomain parameter is not set, SLB uses the private IP addresses of backend servers as the domain names for health checks. domain: The domain name must be 1 to 80 characters in length. It can contain only letters, digits, periods (.),and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_http_code
documentation:
Attribute HealthCheckHttpCode: The HTTP status code that indicates a successful health check.

Separate multiple HTTP status codes with commas (,). Default value: http_2xx.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_interval
documentation: Attribute HealthCheckInterval: The time interval between two consecutive health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_timeout
documentation:
Attribute HealthCheckTimeout: The timeout period of a health check response.

If a backend ECS instance does not send an expected response within the specified period of time, the ECS instance is considered unhealthy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_health_check_uri
documentation: Attribute HealthCheckUri: The URI that is used for health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_healthy_threshold
documentation:
Attribute HealthyThreshold: The number of consecutive successful health checks that must occur before an unhealthy backend server is declared healthy.

In this case, the health check state is changed from fail to success.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_listener_port
documentation: Attribute ListenerPort: The listener port that is used by the SLB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_listener_sync
documentation: Attribute ListenerSync: Indicates whether the forwarding rule uses the scheduling algorithm, session persistence, and health check configurations of the listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_load_balancer_id
documentation: Attribute LoadBalancerId: The ID of the SLB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_rule_id
documentation: Attribute RuleId: The ID of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_rule_name
documentation: Attribute RuleName: The name of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_scheduler
documentation: Attribute Scheduler: The scheduling algorithm.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_sticky_session
documentation:
Attribute StickySession: Indicates whether session persistence is enabled.

Valid values: on and off.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_sticky_session_type
documentation: Attribute StickySessionType: The method that is used to handle a cookie.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_unhealthy_threshold
documentation:
Attribute UnhealthyThreshold: The number of consecutive failed health checks that must occur before a healthy backend server is declared unhealthy.

In this case, the health check state is changed from success to fail.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.Rule.attr_url
documentation: Attribute Url: The URL that is configured in the forwarding rule.

Valid values: ipv4 and ipv6.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.ZonesProps.address_type
documentation: Property addressType: The type of network.Valid values: vpc, classic_internet, and classic_intranet.. vpc: an internal SLB instance that is deployed in a virtual private cloud (VPC). classic_internet: a public-facing SLB instance. classic_intranet: an internal SLB instance that is deployed in a classic network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.datasource.ZonesProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

modules.name: ros_cdk_slb
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS SLB Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as SLB from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-slb';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControl

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControl.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControl.attr_acl_id
documentation: Attribute AclId: The ID of the access control list.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::SLB::AccessControl`, which is used to create an access control list (ACL).

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosAccessControl\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-slb-accesscontrol>

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `AccessControl`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-slb-accesscontrol>

```
param acl_name

Property aclName: The name of the access control list.

param acl_entries

Property aclEntries: A list of acl entries. Each entry can be IP addresses or CIDR blocks. Max length: 300.

param address_ip_version

Property addressIpVersion: IP version. Could be "ipv4" or "ipv6".

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.acl_name
documentation: Property aclName: The name of the access control list.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.acl_entries
documentation:
Property aclEntries: A list of acl entries.

Each entry can be IP addresses or CIDR blocks. Max length: 300.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.address_ip_version
documentation:
Property addressIpVersion: IP version.

Could be "ipv4" or "ipv6".

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.AccessControlProps.tags

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.ListenerProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Listener`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-slb-listener>

```
param bandwidth

Property bandwidth: The bandwidth of network, unit in Mbps(Million bits per second). If the specified load balancer with "LOAD_BALANCE_ID" is charged by "paybybandwidth" and is created in classic network, each Listener's bandwidth must be greater than 0 and the sum of all of its Listeners' bandwidth can't be greater than the bandwidth of the load balancer.

param listener_port

Property listenerPort: Port for front listener. Range from 0 to 65535.

param load_balancer_id

Property loadBalancerId: The id of load balancer to create listener.

param protocol

Property protocol: The load balancer transport protocol to use for routing: http, https, tcp, or udp.

param acl_id

Property aclId: The ID of the access control associated with the listener to be created. If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.

param acl_ids

Property aclIds: The ID list of the access controls associated with the listener to be created. If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.AclIds have higher priority than AclId.

param acl_status

Property aclStatus: Indicates whether to enable access control. Valid values: on | off. Default value: off

param acl_type

Property aclType: The access control type: * white: Indicates a whitelist. Only requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are forwarded. This applies to scenarios in which an application only allows access from specific IP addresses. Enabling a whitelist poses some risks to your services. After a whitelist is enabled, only the IP addresses in the list can access the listener. If you enable a whitelist without adding any IP addresses in the list, no requests are forwarded. - black: Indicates a blacklist. Requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are not forwarded (that is, they are blocked). This applies to scenarios in which an application only denies access from specific IP addresses. If you enable a blacklist without adding any IP addresses in the list, all requests are forwarded. If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.

param backend_server_port

Property backendServerPort: Backend server can listen on ports from 1 to 65535.

param ca_certificate_id

Property caCertificateId: CA server certificate id, for https listener only.

param connection_drain

Property connectionDrain: Whether to enable graceful connection interruption. Value:on: turn on off: Not turned on Note: Only effective TCP listener.

param connection_drain_timeout

Property connectionDrainTimeout: Set the connection graceful interruption timeout. Unit: seconds. Value range: 10-900. Note: Only effective for TCP listener. When ConnectionDrain is on, this option is required.

param description

Property description: The description of the listener.It must be 1 to 80 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), forward slashes (/), periods (.), and underscores (_). Chinese characters are supported.

param enable_http2

Property enableHttp2: Specifies whether to use HTTP/2. It takes effect when Protocol=https. Valid values: on: yes off: no

param gzip

Property gzip: Specifies whether to enable Gzip compression to compress specific types of files. Valid values: on (default): yes off: no

param health_check

Property healthCheck: The properties of health checking setting.

param http_config

Property httpConfig: Config for http protocol.

param idle_timeout

Property idleTimeout: Specify the idle connection timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-60 If no request is received during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will temporarily terminate the connection and restart the connection when the next request comes.

param master_slave_server_group_id

Property masterSlaveServerGroupId: The id of the MasterSlaveServerGroup which use in listener.

param persistence

Property persistence: The properties of persistence.

param port_range

Property portRange: Port range, only supports TCP or UDP listener. ListenerPort should be 0 when PortRange is specified.

param proxy_protocol_v2_enabled

Property proxyProtocolV2Enabled: Whether to support carrying the client source address to the backend server through the Proxy Protocol. Value: true: Yes false (default): No Note: Only effective TCP or UDP listener.

param request_timeout

Property requestTimeout: Specify the request timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-180 If no response is received from the backend server during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will stop waiting and send an HTTP 504 error to the client.

param scheduler

Property scheduler: The scheduling algorithm. Valid values: wrr: Backend servers that have higher weights receive more requests than those that have lower weights. wlc: Requests are distributed based on the combination of the weights and connections to backend servers. If two backend servers have the same weight, the backend server that has fewer connections receives more requests. rr: Requests are distributed to backend servers in sequence. sch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on source IP addresses. Requests from the same source IP address are distributed to the same backend server. tch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on four factors: source IP address, destination IP address, source port number, and destination port number. Requests that contain the same preceding information are distributed to the same backend server. Default: wrr

param server_certificate_id

Property serverCertificateId: Server certificate id, for https listener only, this properties is required.

param start_listener

Property startListener: Whether start listener after listener created. Default True.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param tls_cipher_policy

Property tlsCipherPolicy: The Transport Layer Security (TLS) security policy. Each security policy contains TLS protocol versions and cipher suites available for HTTPS. It takes effect when Protocol=https.

param v_server_group_id

Property vServerGroupId: The id of the VServerGroup which use in listener.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.ListenerProps.bandwidth
documentation:
Property bandwidth: The bandwidth of network, unit in Mbps(Million bits per second).

If the specified load balancer with "LOAD_BALANCE_ID" is charged by "paybybandwidth" and is created in classic network, each Listener's bandwidth must be greater than 0 and the sum of all of its Listeners' bandwidth can't be greater than the bandwidth of the load balancer.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.ListenerProps.listener_port
documentation:
Property listenerPort: Port for front listener.

Range from 0 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.ListenerProps.load_balancer_id
documentation: Property loadBalancerId: The id of load balancer to create listener.

Property aclStatus: Indicates whether to enable access control.

Valid values: on | off. Default value: off

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.ListenerProps.acl_type
documentation:
Property aclType: The access control type: * white: Indicates a whitelist.

Only requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are forwarded. This applies to scenarios in which an application only allows access from specific IP addresses.
Enabling a whitelist poses some risks to your services.
After a whitelist is enabled, only the IP addresses in the list can access the listener.
If you enable a whitelist without adding any IP addresses in the list, no requests are forwarded.

- black: Indicates a blacklist. Requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are not forwarded (that is, they are blocked). This applies to scenarios in which an application only denies access from specific IP addresses.
  If you enable a blacklist without adding any IP addresses in the list, all requests are forwarded.

If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.

documentation:
Properties for defining a `LoadBalancerClone`.

```
param source_load_balancer_id

Property sourceLoadBalancerId: Source load balancer id to clone.

param backend_servers

Property backendServers: The list of ECS instance, which will attached to load balancer.

param backend_servers_policy

Property backendServersPolicy: Solution for handle the backend server and weights. If select 'clone', it will clone from source load balancer. If select 'empty' it will not attach any backend servers. If select 'append' it will append the new backend server list to source backed servers. If select 'replace' it will only attach new backend server list. Default is 'clone'.

param instance_charge_type

Property instanceChargeType: Instance billing method. Value:PayBySpec: Pay by spec. PayByCLCU: billed by usage. If not specified, it is same with the source load balancer.

param load_balancer_name

Property loadBalancerName: Name of created load balancer. Length is limited to 1-80 characters, allowed to contain letters, numbers, '-, /, _,.' When not specified, a default name will be assigned.

param load_balancer_spec

Property loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the load balancer. If not specified, it is same with the source load balancer. Note If InstanceChargeType is set to PayByCLCU, the LoadBalancerSpec parameter is invalid and you do not need to set this parameter.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to slb. Max support 5 tags to add during create slb. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param tags_policy

Property tagsPolicy: Solution for handle the tags. If select 'clone', it will clone from source load balancer. If select 'empty' it will not copy tags. If select 'append' it will append the new tags. If select 'replace' it will add new tags. Default is 'empty'.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The new VSwitch ID to create load balancer instance. For VPC network only and the VSwitch should belong to the VPC which source load balancer is located.When not specified, source load balancer VSwitch ID will be used.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.LoadBalancerProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `LoadBalancer`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-slb-loadbalancer>

```
param address_ip_version

Property addressIpVersion: IP version, support 'ipv4' or 'ipv6'. If 'ipv6' is selected, please note that the zone and the specification are supported.

param address_type

Property addressType: The network type of the CLB instance. Valid values: - internet (default): After an internet-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a public IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests over the Internet. - intranet: After an internal-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a private IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests only over the internal networks.

param bandwidth

Property bandwidth: The bandwidth for network, unit in Mbps(Mega bit per second). Default is 1. If InternetChargeType is specified as "paybytraffic", this property will be ignore and please specify the "Bandwidth" in ALIYUN::SLB::Listener.

param deletion_protection

Property deletionProtection: Whether to enable deletion protection.

param instance_charge_type

Property instanceChargeType: Instance billing method. Valid value: - PayBySpec (default): Pay by spec. - PayByCLCU: billed by usage.

param internet_charge_type

Property internetChargeType: The metering method of the Internet-facing CLB instance. Valid values: - paybytraffic (default): If you set the value to paybytraffic, you do not need to specify Bandwidth. Even if you specify Bandwidth, the value does not take effect. - paybybandwidth: pay-by-bandwidth. Note If you set PayType to PayOnDemand and set InstanceChargeType to PayByCLCU, you must set InternetChargeType to paybytraffic.

param load_balancer_name

Property loadBalancerName: Name of created load balancer. Length is limited to 1-80 characters, allowed to contain letters, numbers, '-, /, _,.' When not specified, a default name will be assigned.

param load_balancer_spec

Property loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the CLB instance. Valid values: - slb.s1.small - slb.s2.small - slb.s2.medium - slb.s3.small - slb.s3.medium - slb.s3.large Note If you do not specify this parameter, a shared-resource CLB instance is created. Shared-resource CLB instances are no longer available for purchase. Therefore, you must specify this parameter. If InstanceChargeType is set to PayByCLCU, this parameter is invalid and you do not need to specify this parameter.

param master_zone_id

Property masterZoneId: The master zone id to create load balancer instance.

param modification_protection_reason

Property modificationProtectionReason: Set the reason for modifying the protection status. The length is 1-80 English or Chinese characters, must start with upper and lower letters or Chinese, and can include numbers, periods (.), underscores (_) and dashes (-). Only valid when ModificationProtectionStatus is ConsoleProtection.

param modification_protection_status

Property modificationProtectionStatus: NonProtection or empty: means no restriction on modification protection ConsoleProtection: Modify instance protection status by console Default value is empty.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

param slave_zone_id

Property slaveZoneId: The slave zone id to create load balancer instance.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to slb. Max support 5 tags to add during create slb. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The VPC id to create load balancer instance. For VPC network only.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The VSwitch id to create load balancer instance. For VPC network only.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.LoadBalancerProps.address_ip_version
documentation:
Property addressIpVersion: IP version, support 'ipv4' or 'ipv6'.

If 'ipv6' is selected, please note that the zone and the specification are supported.

Valid values:

- **internet** (default): After an internet-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a public IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests over the Internet.
- **intranet**: After an internal-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a private IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests only over the internal networks.

documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.attr_listener_ports_and_protocol
documentation: :Attribute: ListenerPortsAndProtocol: The collection of listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.attr_load_balancer_id
documentation: :Attribute: LoadBalancerId: The id of load balancer

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.bandwidth
documentation: :Property: bandwidth: The bandwidth of network, unit in Mbps(Million bits per second). If the specified load balancer with "LOAD_BALANCE_ID" is charged by "paybybandwidth" and is created in classic network, each Listener's bandwidth must be greater than 0 and the sum of all of its Listeners' bandwidth can't be greater than the bandwidth of the load balancer.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.listener_port
documentation: :Property: listenerPort: Port for front listener. Range from 0 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.load_balancer_id
documentation: :Property: loadBalancerId: The id of load balancer to create listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.protocol
documentation: :Property: protocol: The load balancer transport protocol to use for routing: http, https, tcp, or udp.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.acl_id
documentation:
:Property:

aclId: The ID of the access control associated with the listener to be created.
If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.acl_ids
documentation:
:Property:

aclIds: The ID list of the access controls associated with the listener to be created.
If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.AclIds have higher priority than AclId.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.acl_status
documentation:
:Property:

aclStatus: Indicates whether to enable access control.
Valid values: on | off. Default value: off

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.acl_type
documentation:
:Property:

aclType: The access control type:

- white: Indicates a whitelist. Only requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are forwarded. This applies to scenarios in which an application only allows access from specific IP addresses.
Enabling a whitelist poses some risks to your services.
After a whitelist is enabled, only the IP addresses in the list can access the listener.
If you enable a whitelist without adding any IP addresses in the list, no requests are forwarded.
- black: Indicates a blacklist. Requests from IP addresses or CIDR blocks in the selected access control lists are not forwarded (that is, they are blocked). This applies to scenarios in which an application only denies access from specific IP addresses.
If you enable a blacklist without adding any IP addresses in the list, all requests are forwarded.

If the value of the AclStatus parameter is on, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.backend_server_port
documentation: :Property: backendServerPort: Backend server can listen on ports from 1 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.ca_certificate_id
documentation: :Property: caCertificateId: CA server certificate id, for https listener only.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.connection_drain
documentation:
:Property:

connectionDrain: Whether to enable graceful connection interruption. Value:on: turn on
off: Not turned on
Note: Only effective TCP listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.connection_drain_timeout
documentation:
:Property:

connectionDrainTimeout: Set the connection graceful interruption timeout. Unit: seconds. Value range: 10-900.
Note: Only effective for TCP listener. When ConnectionDrain is on, this option is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.description
documentation: :Property: description: The description of the listener.It must be 1 to 80 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), forward slashes (/), periods (.), and underscores (_). Chinese characters are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.enable_http2
documentation:
:Property:

enableHttp2: Specifies whether to use HTTP/2. It takes effect when Protocol=https. Valid values:
on: yes
off: no

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.gzip
documentation:
:Property:

gzip: Specifies whether to enable Gzip compression to compress specific types of files. Valid values:
on (default): yes
off: no

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.health_check
documentation: :Property: healthCheck: The properties of health checking setting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.http_config
documentation: :Property: httpConfig: Config for http protocol.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.idle_timeout
documentation: :Property: idleTimeout: Specify the idle connection timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-60 If no request is received during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will temporarily terminate the connection and restart the connection when the next request comes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.master_slave_server_group_id
documentation: :Property: masterSlaveServerGroupId: The id of the MasterSlaveServerGroup which use in listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.persistence
documentation: :Property: persistence: The properties of persistence.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.port_range
documentation: :Property: portRange: Port range, only supports TCP or UDP listener. ListenerPort should be 0 when PortRange is specified.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.proxy_protocol_v2_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

proxyProtocolV2Enabled: Whether to support carrying the client source address to the backend server through the Proxy Protocol. Value:
true: Yes
false (default): No
Note: Only effective TCP or UDP listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.request_timeout
documentation: :Property: requestTimeout: Specify the request timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-180 If no response is received from the backend server during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will stop waiting and send an HTTP 504 error to the client.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.scheduler
documentation:
:Property:

scheduler: The scheduling algorithm. Valid values:
wrr: Backend servers that have higher weights receive more requests than those that have lower weights.
wlc: Requests are distributed based on the combination of the weights and connections to backend servers. If two backend servers have the same weight, the backend server that has fewer connections receives more requests.
rr: Requests are distributed to backend servers in sequence.
sch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on source IP addresses. Requests from the same source IP address are distributed to the same backend server.
tch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on four factors: source IP address, destination IP address, source port number, and destination port number. Requests that contain the same preceding information are distributed to the same backend server.
Default: wrr

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.server_certificate_id
documentation: :Property: serverCertificateId: Server certificate id, for https listener only, this properties is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.start_listener
documentation: :Property: startListener: Whether start listener after listener created. Default True.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.tls_cipher_policy
documentation: :Property: tlsCipherPolicy: The Transport Layer Security (TLS) security policy. Each security policy contains TLS protocol versions and cipher suites available for HTTPS. It takes effect when Protocol=https.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.v_server_group_id
documentation: :Property: vServerGroupId: The id of the VServerGroup which use in listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param domain: true
param exp: true
param health_check_method: true
param health_check_type: true
param healthy_threshold: true
param http_code: true
param interval: true
param port: true
param req: true
param switch: true
param timeout: true
param unhealthy_threshold: true
param uri: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.domain
documentation: :Property: domain: The domain of health check target.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.exp
documentation: :Property: exp: The response string for UDP listening health check is limited to letters and numbers, and the maximum length is 64 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.health_check_method
documentation: :Property: healthCheckMethod: The health check method used in HTTP or HTTPS health checks. Valid values: head and get.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.health_check_type
documentation: :Property: healthCheckType: The type of health check.Valid values: tcp, udp, https and http. Default value: tcp.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.healthy_threshold
documentation: :Property: healthyThreshold: The number of consecutive health checks successes required,before identified the backend server in Healthy status.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.http_code
documentation: :Property: httpCode: The expect status of health check result. Any answer other than referred status within the timeout period is considered unhealthy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.interval
documentation: :Property: interval: The approximate interval, unit in seconds, between health checks of an backend server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port being checked. The range of valid ports is 0 through 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.req
documentation: :Property: req: The request string for UDP listening health check is limited to letters and numbers, and the maximum length is 64 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.switch
documentation:
:Property:

switch: Whether to enable health check. Valid value: on, off.
If value is on, turn on the health check. If value is off, turn off the health checkIf value is not set, the health check is disabled by default, unless any health check items are configured.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.timeout
documentation: :Property: timeout: The amount of time, in seconds, during which no response means a failed health check.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.unhealthy_threshold
documentation: :Property: unhealthyThreshold: The number of consecutive health checks failures required,before identified the backend server in Unhealthy status.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HealthCheckProperty.uri
documentation: :Property: uri: The url of health check target.

param listener_forward: true

forwardPort: HTTP to HTTPS listening forwarding port.
Default value: 443.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.HttpConfigProperty.listener_forward

listenerForward: Whether to enable HTTP to HTTPS forwarding.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.cookie
documentation: :Property: cookie: The type of session persistence.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.cookie_timeout
documentation: :Property: cookieTimeout: The timeout for cookie setting, in seconds. It only take effect while StickySession is setting to 'on' and StickySessionType is setting to 'insert'.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.persistence_timeout
documentation: :Property: persistenceTimeout: The timeout number of persistence, in seconds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.sticky_session
documentation: :Property: stickySession: The switch of session persistence. Support 'on' and 'off'.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.sticky_session_type
documentation: :Property: stickySessionType: The type of session persistence. Depends on parameter StickySession, if it is set to off, this parameter will be ignored.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for
documentation: :Property: xForwardedFor: Use 'X-Forwarded-For' to get real ip of accessor. On for open, off for close.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for_client_src_port
documentation: :Property: xForwardedForClientSrcPort: Optional. Indicates whether to use the X-Forwarded-Client-srcport header field to retrieve the port used by a client to connect to the SLB instance. Valid values: on | off. Default value: offIf you do not set this parameter, the default value is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for_proto
documentation: :Property: xForwardedForProto: Optional. Indicates whether to use the X-Forwarded-Proto header field to obtainthe listening protocol used by the SLB instance. Valid values: on | off. Default value: offIf you do not set this parameter, the default value is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for_slbid
documentation: :Property: xForwardedForSlbid: Optional. Indicates whether to use the SLB-ID header field to obtain the SLB instance ID. Valid values: on | off. Default value: off If you do not set this parameter, the default value is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for_slbip
documentation: :Property: xForwardedForSlbip: Optional. Indicates whether to use the SLB-IP header field to obtainthe real IP address of a client request.Valid values: on | off. Default value: offIf you do not set this parameter, the default value is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListener.PersistenceProperty.x_forwarded_for_slbport
documentation: :Property: xForwardedForSlbport: Optional. Indicates whether to use the X-Forwarded-Port header field to retrieve the listening ports of the SLB instance. Valid values: on | off. Default value: offIf you do not set this parameter, the default value is used.

on: yes

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.gzip
documentation:
:Property:

gzip: Specifies whether to enable Gzip compression to compress specific types of files. Valid values:
on (default): yes
off: no

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.health_check
documentation: :Property: healthCheck: The properties of health checking setting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.http_config
documentation: :Property: httpConfig: Config for http protocol.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.idle_timeout
documentation: :Property: idleTimeout: Specify the idle connection timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-60 If no request is received during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will temporarily terminate the connection and restart the connection when the next request comes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.master_slave_server_group_id
documentation: :Property: masterSlaveServerGroupId: The id of the MasterSlaveServerGroup which use in listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.persistence
documentation: :Property: persistence: The properties of persistence.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.port_range
documentation: :Property: portRange: Port range, only supports TCP or UDP listener. ListenerPort should be 0 when PortRange is specified.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.proxy_protocol_v2_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

proxyProtocolV2Enabled: Whether to support carrying the client source address to the backend server through the Proxy Protocol. Value:
true: Yes
false (default): No
Note: Only effective TCP or UDP listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.request_timeout
documentation: :Property: requestTimeout: Specify the request timeout in seconds. Valid value: 1-180 If no response is received from the backend server during the specified timeout period, Server Load Balancer will stop waiting and send an HTTP 504 error to the client.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.scheduler
documentation:
:Property:

scheduler: The scheduling algorithm. Valid values:
wrr: Backend servers that have higher weights receive more requests than those that have lower weights.
wlc: Requests are distributed based on the combination of the weights and connections to backend servers. If two backend servers have the same weight, the backend server that has fewer connections receives more requests.
rr: Requests are distributed to backend servers in sequence.
sch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on source IP addresses. Requests from the same source IP address are distributed to the same backend server.
tch: specifies consistent hashing that is based on four factors: source IP address, destination IP address, source port number, and destination port number. Requests that contain the same preceding information are distributed to the same backend server.
Default: wrr

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.server_certificate_id
documentation: :Property: serverCertificateId: Server certificate id, for https listener only, this properties is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.start_listener
documentation: :Property: startListener: Whether start listener after listener created. Default True.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.tls_cipher_policy
documentation: :Property: tlsCipherPolicy: The Transport Layer Security (TLS) security policy. Each security policy contains TLS protocol versions and cipher suites available for HTTPS. It takes effect when Protocol=https.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosListenerProps.v_server_group_id
documentation: :Property: vServerGroupId: The id of the VServerGroup which use in listener.

documentation: :Property: addressIpVersion: IP version, support 'ipv4' or 'ipv6'. If 'ipv6' is selected, please note that the zone and the specification are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.address_type
documentation:
:Property:

addressType: The network type of the CLB instance. Valid values:

- **internet** (default): After an internet-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a public IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests over the Internet.
- **intranet**: After an internal-facing CLB instance is created, the system assigns a private IP address to the CLB instance. Then, the CLB instance can forward requests only over the internal networks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.bandwidth
documentation: :Property: bandwidth: The bandwidth for network, unit in Mbps(Mega bit per second). Default is 1. If InternetChargeType is specified as "paybytraffic", this property will be ignore and please specify the "Bandwidth" in ALIYUN::SLB::Listener.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Whether to enable deletion protection.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.instance_charge_type
documentation:
:Property:

instanceChargeType: Instance billing method. Valid value:

- **PayBySpec** (default): Pay by spec.
- **PayByCLCU**: billed by usage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.internet_charge_type
documentation:
:Property:

internetChargeType: The metering method of the Internet-facing CLB instance. Valid values:

- **paybytraffic** (default): If you set the value to paybytraffic, you do not need to specify Bandwidth. Even if you specify Bandwidth, the value does not take effect.
- **paybybandwidth**: pay-by-bandwidth.
**Note** If you set PayType to PayOnDemand and set InstanceChargeType to PayByCLCU, you must set InternetChargeType to paybytraffic.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.load_balancer_name
documentation: :Property: loadBalancerName: Name of created load balancer. Length is limited to 1-80 characters, allowed to contain letters, numbers, '-, /, _,.' When not specified, a default name will be assigned.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.load_balancer_spec
documentation:
:Property:

loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the CLB instance. Valid values:

- **slb.s1.small**
- **slb.s2.small**
- **slb.s2.medium**
- **slb.s3.small**
- **slb.s3.medium**
- **slb.s3.large**
**Note** If you do not specify this parameter, a shared-resource CLB instance is created. Shared-resource CLB instances are no longer available for purchase. Therefore, you must specify this parameter.
If InstanceChargeType is set to PayByCLCU, this parameter is invalid and you do not need to specify this parameter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.master_zone_id
documentation: :Property: masterZoneId: The master zone id to create load balancer instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.modification_protection_reason
documentation:
:Property:

modificationProtectionReason: Set the reason for modifying the protection status. The length is 1-80 English or Chinese characters, must start with upper and lower letters or Chinese, and can include numbers, periods (.), underscores (_) and dashes (-).
Only valid when ModificationProtectionStatus is ConsoleProtection.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosLoadBalancer.modification_protection_status
documentation:
:Property:

modificationProtectionStatus: NonProtection or empty: means no restriction on modification protection
ConsoleProtection: Modify instance protection status by console
Default value is empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param cookie: true
param cookie_timeout: true
param health_check: true
param health_check_connect_port: true
param health_check_domain: true
param health_check_http_code: true
param health_check_interval: true
param health_check_timeout: true
param health_check_uri: true
param healthy_threshold: true
param listener_sync: true
param scheduler: true
param sticky_session: true
param sticky_session_type: true
param unhealthy_threshold: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.cookie
documentation:
:Property:

cookie: The cookie that is configured on the server.
The cookie must be 1 to 200 characters in length and can contain only ASCII characters and digits. It cannot contain commas (,), semicolons (;), or space characters. It cannot start with a dollar sign ($).

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.cookie_timeout
documentation: :Property: cookieTimeout: The timeout period of a cookie. Unit: seconds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check
documentation:
:Property:

healthCheck: Specifies whether to enable the health check feature. Valid values:
on: yes
off: no

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_connect_port
documentation: :Property: healthCheckConnectPort: The port that is used for health checks. Valid values: 1 to 65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_domain
documentation:
:Property:

healthCheckDomain: The domain name that is used for health checks. Valid values:
$_ip: the private IP address of a backend server. If you do not set this parameter or set the parameter to $_ip, the SLB instance uses the private IP address of each backend server for health checks.
domain: The domain name must be 1 to 80 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_http_code
documentation:
:Property:

healthCheckHttpCode: The HTTP status code for a successful health check. Multiple HTTP status codes are separated by commas (,).
Valid values: http_2xx, http_3xx, http_4xx, and http_5xx.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_interval
documentation: :Property: healthCheckInterval: The interval between two consecutive health checks. Unit: seconds. Valid values: 1 to 50.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_timeout
documentation: :Property: healthCheckTimeout: The timeout period of a health check response. If a backend server, such as an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance, does not return a health check response within the specified timeout period, the server fails the health check. Unit: seconds. Valid values: 1 to 300.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.health_check_uri
documentation: :Property: healthCheckUri: The URI that is used for health checks.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.healthy_threshold
documentation: :Property: healthyThreshold: The number of times that an unhealthy backend server must consecutively pass health checks before it is declared healthy. In this case, the health status is changed from fail to success.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.listener_sync
documentation:
:Property:

listenerSync: Specifies whether to use the scheduling algorithm, session persistence, and health check configurations of the listener. Valid values:
on: uses the configurations of the listener.
off: does not use the configurations of the listener. You can customize the health check and session persistence configurations for the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.scheduler
documentation:
:Property:

scheduler: The scheduling algorithm. Valid values:
wrr: Backend servers with higher weights receive more requests than those with lower weights.
rr: Requests are distributed to backend servers in sequence.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.sticky_session
documentation:
:Property:

stickySession: Specifies whether to enable session persistence. Valid values:
on: yes
off: no

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.sticky_session_type
documentation:
:Property:

stickySessionType: The method that is used to handle a cookie. Valid values:
insert: inserts a cookie.
server: rewrites a cookie.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosRule.AdvancedSettingsProperty.unhealthy_threshold
documentation: :Property: unhealthyThreshold: The number of times that a healthy backend server must consecutively fail health checks before it is declared unhealthy. In this case, the health status is changed from success to fail.

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosTLSPolicy.ciphers

:Property:

ciphers: The supported cipher suites, which are determined by the TLS protocol version. You can specify at most 32 cipher suites.TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 support the following cipher suites:
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA
AES128-SHA
AES256-SHA
DES-CBC3-SHA
TLS 1.2 supports the following cipher suites:
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA
AES128-SHA
AES256-SHA
DES-CBC3-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA256
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA384
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA256
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA384
AES128-GCM-SHA256
AES256-GCM-SHA384
AES128-SHA256
AES256-SHA256
TLS 1.3 supports the following cipher suites:
TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
TLS_AES_128_CCM_SHA256
TLS_AES_128_CCM_8_SHA256

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosTLSPolicy.tls_policy_name
documentation: :Property: tlsPolicyName: The name of the TLS policy. The name must be 1 to 200 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.RosTLSPolicy.tls_versions
documentation: :Property: tlsVersions: The version of the TLS protocol.

ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA
AES128-SHA
AES256-SHA
DES-CBC3-SHA
TLS 1.2 supports the following cipher suites:
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA
AES128-SHA
AES256-SHA
DES-CBC3-SHA
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-SHA256
ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-SHA384
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ECDHE-RSA-AES128-SHA256
ECDHE-RSA-AES256-SHA384
AES128-GCM-SHA256
AES256-GCM-SHA384
AES128-SHA256
AES256-SHA256
TLS 1.3 supports the following cipher suites:
TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
TLS_AES_128_CCM_SHA256
TLS_AES_128_CCM_8_SHA256

methods.name: ros_cdk_slb.TLSPolicyProps.tls_policy_name
documentation:
Property tlsPolicyName: The name of the TLS policy.

The name must be 1 to 200 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::SLB::VServerGroup`, which is used to create a server group and attach backend servers to a Server Load Balancer (SLB) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosVServerGroup\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-slb-vservergroup>

Properties for defining a `VServerGroup`.

param load_balancer_id

Property loadBalancerId: The id of load balancer.

param v_server_group_name

Property vServerGroupName: Display name of the VServerGroup.

param backend_servers

Property backendServers: The list of a combination of ECS Instance-Port-Weight.Same ecs instance with different port is allowed, but same ecs instance with same port isn't.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
